policy.source_linkage_required: Media cannot enter OCR/transcript/customer-facing claim use without public/operator authorization and source-document linkage.
policy.transcript_acceptance_required: Linked audio may enter SAS-BABLOS-004 transcript acceptance, but remains internal-only until accepted.
policy.ocr_blocked_now: No image or chart candidate is OCR-ready because no source-linked image/chart artifact with checksum exists.
policy.chart_interpretation: Chart interpretation is manual-review-only; OCR may only recover visible text after linkage.
policy.blocked_rows_not_evidence: Unsupported or missing media rows are blockers, not wins, losses, weak evidence, or strong evidence.
